# Regex fixtures for skill: agent-team-execution
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from alert-hygiene MATCH fixture.

MATCH: dispatch a swarm of agents to tackle the migration in parallel
MATCH: fan out the work to specialist agents for each layer of the stack
MATCH: run a multi-agent execution across all the affected modules

NO_MATCH: our alerts are flapping and pager is noisy, help tune thresholds
